prompt: Write 3 5-star customer testimonial templates for openpatent.ai (one each for a solo inventor, an indie AI researcher, and a Series A startup founder). Each testimonial must (a) open with the customer's specific win (e.g. 'I lost sleep over the $4k legal bill after an LLM regurgitated my idea'), (b) name a concrete result (filed 1 disclosure in 90 seconds, $10 cost, Bitcoin OTS confirmation email within 10 minutes), (c) close with a strong quote. Include name, role, company (fictional but realistic), and a star rating. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {testimonials:[3 strings], signature:string}.
